citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:25 a.m. on
February 24, 2026. The inspectors spoke to the licensee in person. The licensee stated she was not available to complete
the inspection due to a prior obligation.
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations.
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
Additional Inspectors:
WILLIAM HEINE, ANIMAL CARE INSPECTOREnd Section
